case_title: ZIONS FIRST NATIONAL BANK VS. CHRISTINE F LEE et al

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF ZIONS FIRST NATIONAL BANK'S APPLICATION OF PLAINTIFF FOR APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER AND FOR ISSUANCE OF A TRO AND OSC IS OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(B) AND THE COURT'S JULY 7, 2011 DIRECTIVE. DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: HEARING ON PLAINTIFF ZIONS FIRST NATIONAL BANK'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS CONTINUED TO MAY 20, 2011 FOR MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE DEPARTMENT 301 WITH ENDORSED FILED COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS NO LATER THAN MAY 17, 2011 BY NOON PER LOCAL RULE 2.6 (B). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
DECLARATION OF (SUPPLEMENTAL) M. NEAL ECKARD, RECEIVER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZIONS FIRST NATIONAL BANK
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-20-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZIONS FIRST NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, CHRISTINE F DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-23-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-21-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-08-2011
ORDER APPOINTING RECEIVER AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER-RENTS, ISSUES, AND PROFICTS

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. HEARING ON PLAINTIFF ZIONS FIRST NATIONAL BANK'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS GRANTED PROVIDED THAT PLAINTIFF PROVIDES THE COURT AT THE HEARING WITH A PROOF OF SERVICE INDICATIVE OF PERSONAL SERVICE ON DEFENDANT ON OR BEFORE APRIL 29 IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE COURT'S APRIL 28 ORDER SETTING THIS HEARING; OTHERWISE OFF-CALENDAR. THE COURT EXTENDED THE EXISTING RECEIVERSHIP FOR 1 WEEK OR UNTIL MAY 27, 2011 TO GIVE PLAINTIFF TIME TO COME UP WITH AN APPROPRIATE PAPERWORK. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-23-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COURTESY COPIES TO REFLECT THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, COURT REPORTER: GISELLE CASEY, CSR # 8068.

Off Calendar Sep-09-2011 Continued To Dec-23-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Hearing On Application Of Pltf For Appointment Of Receiver And For Issuance Of A Tro And Osc
Off Calendar Jul-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF ZIONS FIRST NATIONAL BANK'S Application Of Plaintiff For Appointment Of Receiver And For Issuance Of A Tro And Osc IS OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(B) AND THE COURT'S JULY 7, 2011 DIRECTIVE. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

Notice Of Hearing On Application Of Pltf For Appointment Of Receiver And For Issuance Of A Tro And Osc
Off Calendar Jul-07-2011 Continued To Jul-14-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF ZIONS FIRST NATIONAL BANK'S Notice Of Hearing On Application For Appointment Of Receiver And For Issuance Of A TRO And OSC.
Continued to 7/14/11 for Plaintiff to provide Department 301 with courtesy copies of its moving papers including proof of service, per SF Local Rule 2.6(b), no later than 7/12/11. Courtesy copies to reflect the new hearing date. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Court Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR # 8068. (301/PJB)

Hearing On Plaintiff Zions First National Bank'S Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar May-20-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARGARET E. GARMS OF THE PARKINSON PHINNEY, TEL. NO. (916) 449-1443 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. Hearing On Plaintiff Zions First National Bank'S Order To Show Cause IS GRANTED PROVIDED THAT PLAINTIFF PROVIDES THE COURT AT THE HEARING WITH A PROOF OF SERVICE INDICATIVE OF PERSONAL SERVICE ON DEFENDANT ON OR BEFORE APRIL 29 IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE COURT'S APRIL 28 ORDER SETTING THIS HEARING; OTHERWISE OFF-CALENDAR. THE COURT EXTENDED THE EXISTING RECEIVERSHIP FOR 1 WEEK OR UNTIL MAY 27, 2011 TO GIVE PLAINTIFF TIME TO COME UP WITH AN APPROPRIATE PAPERWORK. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

Hearing On Plaintiff Zions First National Bank'S Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar May-17-2011 Continued To May-20-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
Hearing On Plaintiff Zions First National Bank'S Order To Show Cause IS CONTINUED TO MAY 20, 2011 FOR MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE DEPARTMENT 301 WITH ENDORSED FILED COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS NO LATER THAN MAY 17, 2011 BY NOON PER LOCAL RULE 2.6 (B). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
